name: Honey Lemon Soaked Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar in a large bowl until light and fluffy.
2. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. Stir in honey.
4. In a separate bowl, whisk together flour, baking powder, salt, and baking soda.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture, alternating with milk, until just combined.
6. Pour batter into a greased and floured 6-cup tube pan.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 35-50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow the cake to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before transferring it to a cooling rack with wax paper beneath.
9. Drizzle warm mixture of honey and lemon juice over the warm cake.
10. Cool completely, then dust with powdered sugar.
11. Serve at room temperature.
